text:
ONE PIECE HEROINES | Official Trailer
Introducing "ONE PIECE HEROINES," a special anime episode celebrating the charm of the heroines of ONE PIECE. ًںڈ´â€چâک ï¸ڈًں‘ 

ًں“؛Broadcasting in Japan on July 5, 2026, at 11:15 p.m.

â—† Synopsis
After buying a pair of shoes that end up hurting her feet, Nami returns to the shop feeling dissatisfied.
There, she meets Lebno, the designer, who tells her, â€œIâ€™ll make you a brand-new pair from scratchâ€”but only if youâ€™ll be my model.â€‌
The shoes are crafted by the artisan Miucha, leading to an unexpected and stylish encounter.

â—† About the series
ONE PIECE HEROINES is an anime that showcases the charm of the heroines of ONE PIECE through stories not told in the main series.
Based on the novel series ONE PIECE novel HEROINES, originally featured in ONE PIECE magazine, the episode â€œEpisode: NAMIâ€‌ is being adapted into anime form.

Set in the world of the main story and featuring familiar characters such as Robin, a brand-new story unfolds.

â—† Theme Song
"Blue Shining Star" By AiNA THE END

â—† Staff
Director: Haruka Kamatani
Character Design /Animation Director: Takashi Kojima
Screenplay: Momoka Toyoda
Music: Alisa Okehazama

â—† Voice
Nami:  Akemi Okamura
Robin: Yuriko Yamaguchi
Miucha: Maaya Sakamoto
Lebno: Takehito Koyasu
